A field note on steady-day energy changes

Clinical depression is more than grief in this synthetic example of a sustained mood change.

Symptoms can affect the fictional subject's sleep, appetite, energy, concentration, and routine.

What causes depression?

The example attributes may include biology, family context, stressful events, and other conditions.

How is depression treated?

Talk therapy, medicine, support, and lifestyle changes are sample options; treatment can help in this scenario.
